name: Oriental Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the soy oil, white vinegar, tomato paste, soy sauce, MSG (if using), salt, ground ginger, sliced celery, and coarsely chopped onion in a blender container.
2. Blend at medium speed for 3 to 4 seconds until all ingredients are finely grated and well combined.
3. Makes 1 1/4 cups.
